merge_notes: Both claudecode and codex correctly implemented the triple timeframe MACD resonance analysis methodology. The key requirements were: (1) separate data fetching for daily (90 days), weekly (52 weeks), and monthly (36 months) timeframes; (2) MACD calculation with 12/26/9 parameters; (3) golden cross detection within specified lookback periods (10 days, 4 weeks, 2 months); (4) 20-period MA verification for all three timeframes. Both agents found no stocks meeting all criteria, which is reasonable given the strict filtering conditions. claudecode is preferred due to better output format compliance with the CSV header structure specified in the task.
